title: cynara cardunculus var. scolymus
intro: Cynara cardunculus var. scolymus, also known as artichoke, is a type of thistle plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. The artichoke plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of artichoke include improved digestion, reduced cholesterol levels, and protection against certain types of cancer, such as breast and colon cancer. Artichoke can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
